# Copilot Instructions for Sana Saily Portal

- Keep the site focused on the artist brand: events, compositions, gallery, and contact.
- Prefer a premium, colorful, Bahia-inspired visual language.
- Use local assets from `public/` when available and keep graceful fallbacks when they are missing.
- Keep changes small, responsive, and easy to build with Vite.
- Validate after edits with `npm run build`.
